framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining, coordinated offensive announced
history.note: Day 26. ★★★★ IRGC announced COORDINATED OFFENSIVE by IRGC Navy + Army + Hezbollah against Israel + US bases (Wikipedia/AJE). 58 hospitalized in Israel from missile strike. Iran targeted Gulf countries with missiles+drones AGAIN (oil prices rose). BUT CENTCOM: fire still 1-2 at a time, volume collapsed. 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. US dead: 14 confirmed (13 combat + 1 health) + 6 refueling aircraft crash. AJE: Pakistan shared US ceasefire demands with Iran, awaiting response. 82nd Airborne 1000+ additional soldiers approved by Trump (NBC). PATTERN: IRGC attempting to demonstrate capability via 'coordinated offensive' label but physical volume remains degraded. Scope expanding (Gulf states hit again, 58 hospitalized Israel) but mass salvo era over. Source: AJE/NBC/CBS/Wikipedia/AP

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC 'precision-guided' salvos at Israel+Gulf+US bases
history.note: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★ IRAN COUNTERPROPOSAL + CONTINUED STRIKES: (1) IRGC fired 'precision-guided' missiles+drones at Israel + US bases in Kuwait/Jordan/Bahrain Wed AM (Euronews/AP); (2) Drones hit fuel tank at Kuwait International Airport — fireball (Euronews); (3) Shrapnel fell near Amman, Jordan; air raid warnings in Bahrain; (4) IDF continued wide-scale strikes on Tehran infrastructure Wed; (5) 82nd Airborne 2000-3000 deploying (NPR/WSJ confirmed written orders); (6) CENTCOM: 9000+ targets, 140+ vessels; ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed; (7) Iran death toll: 3230+ (HRANA); US: 14 combat + 1 health + 6 crash = 21 total; (8) IRGC volume STILL declining (1-2 at a time) but hitting WIDER targets — Kuwait airport is NEW. PATTERN: Quantitative degradation confirmed but GEOGRAPHIC expansion (Kuwait airport = civilian infrastructure). Source: Euronews/AP/NPR/WSJ/CENTCOM/ISW/HRANA

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC 'coordinated offensive' label but volume still collapsed
history.note: Day 27 Thu. CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. Cooper: fire declining to 1-2 at a time (confirmed). ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. IRGC announced 'coordinated offensive' (IRGC Navy+Army+Hezbollah) but PHYSICAL volume remains 1-2 at a time — label vs reality. IRGC fired 'precision-guided' missiles+drones at Israel+Kuwait Int'l Airport (fireball on fuel tank, Euronews)+Jordan (shrapnel near Amman)+Bahrain+US bases. IDF continued wide-scale wave on Tehran (Mehrabad airport, IRGC base, police station struck). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying (NYT/CNN/Politico confirmed). Trump: Iran has 4 MORE DAYS before energy infrastructure targeted = ULTIMATUM RESET from Mar 23 postponement. US dead: 21 total. Iran dead: 3230+ (HRANA). PATTERN: Volume collapse confirmed by CENTCOM but SCOPE still expanding — Kuwait Int'l Airport is civilian infrastructure escalation. 82nd Airborne = ground option preparation. Source: CENTCOM/ISW/CNN/NYT/Politico/Euronews/AP/HRANA/Wikipedia

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 600+ ballistic sites struck
history.note: Day 28. CENTCOM Mar 23 video: Arash-2 + Shahed-136 + mobile launch destroyed. ISW Mar 24: IDF 600+ strikes on ballistic missile sites. Iran fired 9 waves at Israel (cluster munitions continuing). IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo capability GONE. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island ports/hangars degrading Iran maritime ops. US dead: 21 total. Iran dead: ~3500+ (estimates). PATTERN: Quantitative degradation confirmed, Iran demonstrating residual capability but mass strike era over. Source: CENTCOM/ISW/AP/AJE

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 9000+ targets, IDF 600+ ballistic sites struck
history.note: Day 28. CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed, 85% SAMs gone. IDF: 600+ strikes on ballistic missile sites. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island ports/hangars. Iran still firing 1-2 at a time (Jerusalem/Tel Aviv/Kuwait airport). US dead: 21 total (14 KIA + 6 crash + 1 health). 290+ wounded. Senate REJECTED War Powers 47-53 (Rand Paul lone R yes). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying (written orders). PATTERN: Volume collapse confirmed, IRGC demonstrating residual capability. Source: CENTCOM/ISW/AJE/Wikipedia/Time/Guardian/Politico

history.est: 1-2 declining, 13 US bases uninhabitable, USS Lincoln ops continue
history.note: Day 28. ★★★★ NEW: NYT/DefSecAsia: 13 US bases in ME nearly UNINHABITABLE from IRGC sustained strikes — troops dispersed to hotels/offices (NYT Mar 25). CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed. USS Abraham Lincoln continues flight ops against Iran targets (CENTCOM Mar 26). IDF: 600+ ballistic sites struck. IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time (mass salvo era over). BUT: (1) IRGC 'precision-guided' missiles+drones at Israel+Kuwait airport+Jordan+Bahrain (Euronews/AP); (2) 82nd Airborne 2000 soldiers deploying with written orders (NYT/CNN/USAToday); (3) Senate REJECTED War Powers 47-53; (4) Iran fired 9 waves at Israel (cluster munitions continuing); (5) US dead: 21 total, 290+ wounded; (6) Iran dead: ~3500+. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed but BASE DEGRADATION is real operational cost — 13 bases uninhabitable = most significant infrastructure damage since Desert Storm. Source: NYT/DefSecAsia/CENTCOM/CNN/USAToday/AP

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM destroyed 2/3 arms manufacturing
history.note: Day 28 21:00. CENTCOM chief: destroyed 2/3 of Iran arms manufacturing (ToI Mar 25). CENTCOM struck 9th Artesh Air Force Tactical Airbase Bandar Abbas Mar 25 (ISW). AJE live tracker: 1,937 killed + 24,800 injured Iran total. 6 US crew killed in refueling crash Iraq Mar 13. Fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island ports. US dead: 14 confirmed KIA (Wikipedia) + 6 crash + 1 health = 21. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapse accelerating — arms manufacturing destruction removes regeneration capacity. Residual precision strikes (Jerusalem/Tel Aviv/Gulf) = demonstrating political will not military capability. Source: ToI/ISW/AJE/CENTCOM/Wikipedia

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM destroyed 2/3 arms mfg, Israel killed IRGC Navy commander
history.note: Day 29. ★★★★ NEW: (1) Israel killed IRGC Navy commander who ordered Hormuz closure (Fox Mar 26); (2) Trump: Iran sent 8-10 tankers through Hormuz as 'present'/good faith gesture; (3) Trump confirms 4-6 week war timeline still holds; (4) CENTCOM: destroyed 2/3 Iran arms manufacturing (ToI); (5) IDF: 600+ ballistic missile sites struck; (6) ISW: CENTCOM struck 9th Artesh AF Tactical AB Bandar Abbas; (7) 13 US bases nearly uninhabitable (NYT); (8) USS Lincoln continues flight ops; (9) Fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era confirmed OVER; (10) Trump declined to say if Iran still has enriched uranium, hints at possible action; (11) 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapse CONFIRMED + leadership decapitation (Navy commander). Source: Fox/CENTCOM/ISW/NYT/ToI

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC claims 220 'coordinated' but volume still collapsed
history.note: Day 29. ★★★★★ BREAKING: Trump EXTENDED energy infrastructure strike deadline 10 DAYS to April 6 8PM ET — 'per Iranian Government request' (NPR/CNBC/Bloomberg/CBS/NYT/Guardian). IRGC claims 220 'coordinated' attacks with regional allies (IRNA/Express Tribune) but fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed. IDF: 600+ ballistic sites struck. ISW: 85% SAMs gone. ISW: CENTCOM struck 9th Artesh AF Tactical AB Bandar Abbas. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island. Israel killed IRGC Navy commander who ordered Hormuz closure (Fox). US dead: 21 total (14 KIA + 6 crash + 1 health), 290+ wounded. Iran dead: 1937 killed + 24800 injured (AJE tracker). 13 US bases nearly uninhabitable (NYT). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying. Senate blocked War Powers 53-47. S&P 500 -1.72% to 6478 on Mar 26. PATTERN: IRGC 220 coordinated attacks = LABEL not VOLUME — physical fire rate UNCHANGED at 1-2. Trump 10-day extension = MAJOR DE-ESCALATION window. Source: NPR/CNBC/Bloomberg/CBS/NYT/Guardian/IRNA/ExpressTribune/CENTCOM/ISW/AJE/Fox

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, mass salvo era OVER
history.note: Day 30. ★★★★ CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation). Destroyed 19 ships + 1 submarine + ~2,000 targets (Wikipedia). 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI). Israel killed IRGC Navy commander who ordered Hormuz closure (Fox). IRGC claims '220 coordinated attacks' but fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). Atlantic: 'massively asymmetrical war' — CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 to clear remaining attack craft + minesweeping for strait. US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash), 290 wounded. Iran dead: 1,937 killed + 24,800 injured (AJE). Murkowski (R) drafting AUMF to force Congress vote. Trump approval 36% new low (Reuters/Ipsos). PATTERN: Volume collapse CONFIRMED + arms regeneration capacity destroyed + leadership decapitation. Source: NewsNation/CENTCOM/Atlantic/Reuters/AJE/Fox/Time/NYT

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, mass salvo era CONFIRMED over
history.note: Day 30. CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation). 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI). Israel killed IRGC Navy commander (Fox). IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). US dead: 21 total, 290+ wounded. Iran dead: 1,937+24,800 injured (AJE). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying. Trump April 6 deadline extended. PATTERN: Volume collapse + arms regeneration destroyed + leadership decapitation = IRGC residual-only. Source: CENTCOM/Fox/NewsNation/AJE

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, IDF sweeping EAST to Mashhad, IRGC Navy commander killed
history.note: Day 31. ★★★★ NEW: (1) ISW Mar 26: Combined force struck MASHHAD (northeastern-most strikes) — Khorasan Razavi Province, 14th Artesh AF + 5th GF Aviation Base at Mashhad Int'l Airport; (2) CENTCOM hit 10,000+ targets (NewsNation); (3) IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Rear Admiral Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas — ordered Hormuz closure (Fox/ISW); (4) ★ IRGC lowered minimum recruitment age to 12 (ISW) = MANPOWER CRISIS signal; (5) Hezbollah claimed 73 attacks in 24h on Israel; (6) 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed (ToI); (7) IDF 600+ ballistic sites struck; (8) IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (9) US dead: 14 KIA + 6 crash + 1 health = 21 total, 290+ wounded; (10) WashPost: ~1,500 Iranian CIVILIANS killed; (11) Brent SURGED to .57 close (+4.22%); (12) Dow -800 entered CORRECTION. PATTERN: IRGC military degradation accelerating — recruitment age 12 = desperate. Combined force expanding strike envelope east. Source: ISW/CENTCOM/Fox/NewsNation/WashPost/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, Prince Sultan AB hit (12 US injured), Arak+Bushehr nuclear sites struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ NUCLEAR ESCALATION + BASE BREACH: (1) IDF confirmed bombing Iran Arak heavy water reactor — 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27); (2) Bushehr nuclear plant struck THIRD TIME Friday night (CNN); (3) 12 US troops injured at Prince Sultan Air Base Saudi Arabia, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious breach since war began; (4) 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost); (5) Iran struck Gulf energy sites (Saudi/Qatar/Kuwait/UAE) after Israel struck South Pars gas field (AJE); (6) Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 of Iran missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%); (7) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed; (8) ToI: US acknowledges war may extend past 4-6 week timeline; (9) Rubio at G7: expects operation 'weeks not months'; (10) Witkoff: negotiations 'this week'. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but NUCLEAR TARGET ESCALATION by IDF + BASE BREACH at Prince Sultan = new escalatory dimension. Source: ToI/CNN/NYT/JPost/AJE/Reuters/AP/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, Houthis joined war, Prince Sultan AB breach, Arak+Bushehr nukes struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS JOINED WAR Mar 28 — ballistic missile toward Israel, Beersheba sirens (Wikipedia). IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27) + Bushehr 3rd time (CNN). 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious base breach. 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost). CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed. IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas (Fox/ISW). IRGC lowered recruitment age to 12 (ISW). Combined force struck MASHHAD — northeastern-most strikes. Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%). Fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over. US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash). NYT: at least 16 killed in Iranian attacks on Israel; 50+ killed in Gulf countries. Source: Wikipedia/NYT/ISW/CNN/ToI/Fox/JPost/Reuters/AJE

history.est: ~1.5 mbd (2-3 ships/day, IMO framework + UNSC drafts)
history.note: Day 26. (1) Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if they coordinate with Iranian authorities (Reuters Mar 24) — ships with no ties to Israel/US allowed (NYT); (2) Bahrain proposed UNSC resolution 'all necessary means' for Hormuz; France tabled rival text (Reuters); (3) Windward: 2.3/day visible, zombie ships with AIS off also transiting; (4) Brent CRASHED below $100 on ceasefire hopes — $98.28 (-6%) Wed Asian; (5) Kalshi: <25% normal transit before Apr 15, 67% by Jun 1; (6) Trump 5-day pause still active (1 day remaining, deadline ~Mar 28); (7) CNBC: tanker traffic won't return for months. PATTERN: TWO competing transit frameworks emerging — Iran's unilateral IMO regime vs Bahrain's UNSC military enforcement. Oil price crash suggests market pricing in diplomatic resolution despite zero physical change in transit volume. Source: Reuters/NYT/CNBC/Windward/Kalshi

history.est: ~1.5 mbd (2-3 ships/day, IRAN COUNTERPROPOSAL CLAIMS HORMUZ SOVEREIGNTY)
history.note: Day 26 Wed. ★★★★★ IRAN'S 5-CONDITION COUNTERPROPOSAL CLAIMS HORMUZ SOVEREIGNTY: (1) Iran rejected US 15-point plan (AP/NPR/NYT Mar 25); (2) Iran issued OWN counterproposal via Press TV: demands reparations + sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz (NPR); (3) Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if coordinated with Iran (Reuters Mar 24); (4) CNBC: Brent -3.8% to $100.54, WTI -3.6% to $89.01 on talks hopes despite Iran rejection; (5) Goldman base case: Hormuz normalize in April over 4 weeks; (6) Windward: 2.3/day visible + zombie ships AIS-off; (7) Bahrain UNSC draft 'all necessary means' + France rival text — vote pending; (8) Trump: Iran gave him 'very big present' related to Hormuz. PATTERN: TWO frameworks now THREE — Iran unilateral IMO regime + Bahrain UNSC military + Iran counterproposal claiming sovereignty. Source: AP/NPR/NYT/Reuters/CNBC/Euronews/Goldman

history.est: ~1.5-2 mbd (5 ships/day Mon — SLIGHT UPTICK from 2.3)
history.note: Day 27. ★★★ AJE/Windward: 5 vessels tracked via AIS on Monday Mar 24 (UP from 2.3/day avg). BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. Iran told IMO 'non-hostile vessels' may transit if coordinated with Iranian authorities (Reuters Mar 24). Bahrain UNSC resolution 'all necessary means' facing opposition — Russia/China likely to VETO (Reuters). France tabled rival text. UN chief Guterres: war 'out of control'. Iran IMO framework = institutional path to partial reopening. BUT no physical change in mine threat, insurance barriers persist. Trump: 4 MORE DAYS → if power plants struck, IRGC complete closure threat reactivates. Goldman base case: Hormuz normalize in April over 4 weeks. Kalshi: <25% normal transit before Apr 15, 67% by Jun 1. Source: AJE/Windward/BBC/Reuters/Fox/UN News/Goldman/Kalshi

history.est: ~2.5 mbd (5-6 ships/day — UPTICK from 2.3)
history.note: Day 28. ★★★ TRANSIT UPTICK: Kpler (India Today Mar 25): 138 ships crossed in March including 87 oil/gas tankers = 5-6/day (UP from 2.3/day Windward). 95% drop from pre-crisis but improving. Lloyd's List: 20+ vessels took 'Tehran-approved route' through Iranian territorial waters via Larak Island. Iran charging ~$2M fee for safe passage. NEW: Iran appointed hardliner Zolghadr as SNSC secretary (ISW). Maham 3/7 mines confirmed (12+); CENTCOM destroyed 44 minelaying vessels. Abu Musa Island ports struck degrading IRGC maritime coordination. White House 'tracking closely' how to get tankers through (US News). PATTERN: Transit IMPROVING despite rejection. Iran monetizing passage. Source: Kpler/India Today/Lloyd's List/ISW/US News

history.est: ~2.5 mbd (5-6 ships/day — UPTICK CONFIRMED by Kpler)
history.note: Day 28. ★★★ TRANSIT UPTICK CONFIRMED: Kpler (India Today): 138 ships March = 5-6/day (UP from 2.3/day). 87 oil/gas tankers. Still 95% drop from pre-crisis. Lloyd's List: 20+ vessels took Tehran-approved Larak Island route. Iran charging ~M/ship. Iran told IMO non-hostile vessels may transit. Iran REJECTED 15-point plan + counterproposed: Hormuz sovereignty + reparations + Lebanon in ceasefire. UNSC: Bahrain draft vs France text, Russia/China likely VETO. Goldman base case: normalize April. Source: Kpler/India Today/Lloyd's List/NYT/CNBC/Guardian

history.est: ~2.5-3 mbd (5-6 ships/day, CHINA TRANSIT CONFIRMED)
history.note: Day 28. ★★★★ CHINA TRANSIT CONFIRMED: (1) CSMonitor Mar 25: Chinese-owned 'Newvoyager' container ship sailed OUT of Hormuz skirting mines — FIRST confirmed Chinese vessel; (2) SCMP Mar 25: Chinese-owned 'Lucky Gas' transited via Larak Island route to Oman's Sohar; (3) Iran FM Araghchi: 5 'friendly nations' (China/India/Russia/Pakistan/Iraq) get OPEN passage; US/Israel/Gulf allies BLOCKED (India Today Mar 26); (4) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day, 87 oil/gas tankers; (5) Lloyd's List: 20+ vessels took Tehran-approved Larak Island route, ~$2M fee each; (6) ISW: IRGC verifies vessel details at Larak Island checkpoint; (7) Araghchi: 'We are in a state of war...it remains open to others'; (8) NYT: Iran told IMO 'non-hostile' ships may transit. PATTERN: Iran FORMALIZING two-tier transit regime — allies get passage, enemies blocked. China becoming ANCHOR CUSTOMER of Iran's new Hormuz order. Source: CSMonitor/SCMP/India Today/Kpler/Lloyd's List/ISW/NYT/Reuters

history.est: ~2.5-3 mbd (5-6 ships/day, two-tier regime solidifying)
history.note: Day 28 21:00. BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. Windward Mar 22: 16 AIS-visible in 7 days = near collapse, BUT Kpler: 138 ships in March = 5-6/day (improvement). Iran told UN/IMO: 'non-hostile' vessels may transit if coordinated (Reuters Mar 24). Lloyd's List: 20+ vessels via Larak Island route, ~$2M fee each. Saudi/UAE bypassing via pipelines (East-West to Yanbu, ADCOP to Fujairah). India/Pakistan sent destroyers to Gulf of Oman escort. TWO-TIER regime solidifying: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) get passage, US/Israel/Gulf allies BLOCKED. PATTERN: Physical transit improving slightly (2.3→5-6/day) as Iran monetizes access. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: BBC/Windward/Kpler/Reuters/Lloyd's List

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + Trump '8-10 tankers' present)
history.note: Day 29. ★★★★★ MAJOR: (1) Trump CONFIRMED Iran allowed 8-10 oil tankers through Hormuz as 'present' = good faith signal (Fox Mar 26); (2) Pakistani-flagged tankers likely; (3) Iran apologized for something + sent 2 more boats; (4) CSMonitor: Chinese 'Newvoyager' sailed OUT of Hormuz; (5) SCMP: Chinese 'Lucky Gas' via Larak route to Oman; (6) Araghchi: 5 'friendly nations' (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) get OPEN passage; (7) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day; (8) Lloyd's: 20+ vessels via Tehran-approved Larak route, ~M fee; (9) Iran FM: 'We are in state of war...remains open to others'. TWO-TIER TRANSIT solidifying + DIPLOMATIC TRANSIT SIGNAL via tanker 'present'. Uptick from ~2.5 to ~3-4 mbd est. Source: Fox/CSMonitor/SCMP/Kpler/Lloyd's/India Today

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + slight Thursday uptick + 8-10 tanker 'present')
history.note: Day 29. ★★★ TRANSIT UPDATE: (1) Guardian Mar 26: 'slight uptick in transits registered on Thursday' but normal navigation NOT resumed; (2) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day (87 oil/gas tankers), still 95% below pre-crisis; (3) Euronews: Thailand tanker (Bangchak Corp) passed through after Iranian approval, second vessel WAITING; (4) Lloyd's: 20+ vessels via Tehran-approved Larak Island route, ~M fee each; (5) Iran FM Araghchi: 5 'friendly nations' (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open passage; (6) Chinese 'Newvoyager' + 'Lucky Gas' confirmed transit; (7) Trump: Iran sent 8-10 tankers as 'present'; (8) UNSC Res 2817 demands Iran cease attacks on neighbors (Fox). PATTERN: Two-tier transit regime SOLIDIFYING. Thailand expansion = beyond initial 5 friendly nations. Insurance barriers persist. Source: Guardian/Kpler/Euronews/Lloyd's/India Today/CSMonitor/SCMP/Fox

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + slight uptick + 8-10 tanker 'present')
history.note: Day 30. ★★★ TRANSIT UPDATE: (1) BBC Verify: ~100 ships Mar 1-20, daily traffic down ~95%; (2) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day; (3) Guardian Mar 26: 'slight uptick Thursday' but normal navigation NOT resumed; (4) Lloyd's: 'Tehran tollbooth' — ships paying ~$2M via Larak Island; (5) Iran FM Araghchi: 5 nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open passage; (6) Trump: Iran sent 8-10 tankers as 'present'; (7) Thailand expanding beyond initial 5; (8) Atlantic: CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep ops for strait clearing; (9) US Energy Sec: Navy may escort by end March; (10) UNSC Res 2817 demands Iran cease attacks on neighbors. TWO-TIER transit regime solidifying. PATTERN: Physical transit improving (2.3→5-6/day) but still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: BBC/Kpler/Guardian/Lloyd's/Atlantic/Fox/India Today

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day + Guardian 'trickle' + Iran 2-tier regime)
history.note: Day 30. Guardian Mar 26: only 4 ships spotted (1 Panama tanker inbound, 2 cargo, 1 LPG outbound) — 'Tehran tollbooth'. BBC Verify: ~100 ships Mar 1-20. Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day. Iran's 2-tier regime: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Trump confirmed Iran sent 8-10 tankers as 'present'. Thailand expanding beyond initial 5. CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep for strait clearing. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: Guardian/BBC/Kpler/Reuters/Atlantic

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day, NYT: 3000 vessels waiting)
history.note: Day 31. ★★★ NYT Mar 26: ~3,000 vessels WAITING to pass — historic backlog. Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day. Guardian: 'Tehran tollbooth' only 4 ships spotted on Mar 24. BBC: ~100 ships Mar 1-20. Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open passage, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Trump confirmed 8-10 tanker 'present'. Thailand expanding beyond initial 5. CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep for strait clearing. Atlantic: CENTCOM to clear remaining attack craft. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Brent closed .57 — HIGHEST since 2022 on negotiation failure fears. Source: NYT/Guardian/BBC/Kpler/CNBC/Atlantic

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (5-6 ships/day, Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships, Oxford: impassable til May)
history.note: Day 32. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) Oxford Economics: Hormuz remains impassable until May; (2) Wikipedia Mar 27: Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships — FRICTION in friendly-nation regime; (3) AJE: payments in yuan for some transits; (4) Kpler: 138 ships March = 5-6/day; (5) NYT: ~3,000 vessels waiting; (6) Guardian: 'Tehran tollbooth' — 4 ships spotted; (7) CBC: 'even if passable tomorrow, weeks before ships reach ports'; (8) Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED; (9) Lloyd's: ships paying ~2M via Larak Island route; (10) CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep for strait clearing. PATTERN: Transit still 95% below pre-crisis. Iran blocking Chinese ships = cracks in friendly-nation framework. Source: Oxford/Wikipedia/AJE/Kpler/NYT/Guardian/CBC/Lloyd's

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4/day MarineTraffic, Greek tankers entering, 3000 vessels waiting)
history.note: Day 32. NYT Mar 26: 28 vessels in 7 days through Wednesday = 4/day (MarineTraffic/Kpler). Greek-owned tanker crossed Mar 28 — 3rd Prokopiou vessel (GreekCityTimes). Oxford Economics: Hormuz impassable until May. Wikipedia Mar 27: Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships — FRICTION in friendly-nation regime. ~3,000 vessels WAITING (NYT). Euronews: Thailand tanker passed, 2nd waiting. Iran two-tier regime: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) open, US/Israel/Gulf BLOCKED. Lloyd's: ~M fee via Larak Island route. CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 + minesweep. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: NYT/MarineTraffic/Kpler/GreekCityTimes/Oxford/Euronews/Lloyd's

q3_spr_release_rate.label: SPR实际释放速率(mbd)
q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.est: ~0.75 mbd first batch, DOE 'record speed'
history.note: Day 26 D+11. SPR first shipments began Fri Mar 21 (Argus). DOE: deliveries at 'record speeds' (BIC Magazine). 45.2M bbl first batch to Shell/Marathon/BP/Gunvor, Apr-May delivery = ~0.75 mbd. Exchange: return 55M bbl (22% premium). 172M bbl US total, 400M bbl global coordinated (32 countries). NTU: 172M = 40% of SPR inventory, draws to 34% capacity. OPIS: half will be loaned not sold. Market: Brent $98.28 Wed (-6%), WTI $87.68 (-5.1%) — oil crashing on DIPLOMACY not SPR. SPR trickle irrelevant vs $15/bbl geopolitical swings. Gas: ~$3.98/gal national (+33%). CAP: war cost $25B by end of week. Source: Argus/BIC/DOE/NTU/OPIS/CAP/ToI/CNBC

history.est: ~0.75 mbd first batch, DOE 'record speed'
history.note: Day 26 D+12. SPR first shipments began Fri Mar 21 (Argus). DOE: deliveries at 'record speeds' (BIC). 45.2M bbl first batch to Shell/Marathon/BP/Gunvor (52% of 86M subscribed). Apr-May delivery = ~0.75 mbd. Exchange: return 55M bbl (22% premium). 172M bbl US total, 400M bbl global (32 countries). NTU: draws to 243M bbl = lowest since 1982. MARKET: Brent $100.54 (-3.8%), WTI $89.01 (-3.6%) Wed — oil declining on DIPLOMACY not SPR. SPR trickle irrelevant vs $15/bbl geopolitical swings. Gas ~$3.98/gal national (+33%). Goldman base case: Hormuz normalize in April. Source: Argus/BIC/DOE/NTU/CNBC/Goldman

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: VERBAL_MEDIATION+FRICTION — China pressuring Iran on Hormuz (Asia Times), 2 Chinese ships blocked
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 32. China pressuring Iran to reopen Hormuz for energy stability (Asia Times Mar 26). MFA Lin Jian Mar 25: 'mediation efforts will not stop'. BUT: (1) Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships (Wikipedia Mar 27) — FRICTION in friendly-nation framework; (2) AJE: transit fees in yuan; (3) Chinese Newvoyager/Lucky Gas previously transited; (4) Trump beseeching China to send naval force (NYT); (5) No Xi-level summit, no naval enforcement, no sanctions threat. ASSESSMENT: China verbal mediation + economic engagement but NO ESCALATION TO ACTION. fp1 mediation threshold NOT met. Iran blocking Chinese ships = new friction point. Source: Asia Times/MFA/Wikipedia/NYT/AJE

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: CONTRADICTION_MAXIMUM — nuclear strikes + negotiations 'this week' + base breach + Houthis
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 32. ★★★★★ fp2 PEAK SUSTAINED: (1) Witkoff: negotiations 'this week'; (2) Trump extended deadline 10 days to April 6 'per Iranian government request'; (3) Guardian: in-person talks could begin Friday (Mar 28); (4) BUT IDF bombed Arak heavy water reactor + Bushehr 3rd time = NUCLEAR ESCALATION during 'negotiations'; (5) 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi — most serious base breach; (6) Houthis JOINED WAR Mar 28 — ballistic missile at Israel (new front); (7) Reuters: ~1/3 missile arsenal confirmed destroyed (not 85%); (8) ToI: US acknowledges war may extend past 4-6 weeks; (9) Rubio at G7: 'weeks not months'; (10) UK NSA Powell at Geneva nuclear talks; (11) Trump approval 36%. ASSESSMENT: MAXIMUM CONTRADICTION — bombing nuclear infrastructure + opening new front while claiming talks 'going well'. Source: Guardian/NYT/CNN/ToI/Reuters/AP

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: BEHAVIORAL_DE-ESCALATION + IN-PERSON_TALKS_IMMINENT but NUCLEAR STRIKES risk framework collapse
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 32. ★★★★ fp3 MIXED-TO-POSITIVE: (1) Guardian: Egyptian/Pakistani officials say in-person negotiations between Washington and Tehran could begin 'as soon as Friday' (Mar 28) — Pakistan or Turkey venue; (2) Witkoff: meetings to negotiate 'this week'; (3) Trump April 6 deadline = 9 days forcing function; (4) UK NSA Powell at Geneva nuclear talks; (5) Iran's 5-point counterproposal: Hormuz sovereignty + reparations + Lebanon in ceasefire (non-starter but ENGAGEMENT); (6) UNSC Res 2817 demands Iran cease attacks; (7) Iran 8-10 tanker 'present' still holds; (8) BUT: IDF striking Arak+Bushehr = NUCLEAR ESCALATION could COLLAPSE framework; (9) Iran vowed retaliation for nuclear site hits; (10) Houthis joining = complicates ceasefire scope. ASSESSMENT: ~55-60% ceasefire framework within 2 weeks (DOWN from 60-65%). In-person talks IMMINENT but nuclear strikes + Houthis risk derailment. Source: Guardian/CNN/ToI/AJE/AP/Reuters

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.status: WTI_TOUCHED_100 + BASE_BREACH_SAUDI + HOUTHIS_NEW_FRONT — political sustainability window weeks
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 32. ★★★★★ fp4 CRITICAL: (1) WTI .64 (+5.46%) TOUCHED  INTRADAY — psychological barrier breached; (2) Brent .57 (+4.22%) HIGHEST since 2022; (3) S&P 500 6,368.85 (-1.67%), 5th straight losing week; (4) Dow entered CORRECTION (-10%); (5) Nasdaq -2.15%; (6) VIX ~30 (elevated fear); (7) Gold ,430/oz; (8) Gas ~/gal (+33%); (9) Trump approval 36% NEW LOW; (10) 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB — base breach in SAUDI ARABIA; (11) Houthis JOINED WAR = new front, new costs; (12) CAP: war cost B+ in 4 weeks; (13) Murkowski drafting AUMF; (14) House War Powers delayed mid-April; (15) Reuters: ~1/3 arsenal confirmed destroyed. ASSESSMENT: COST THRESHOLD BREACHED —  WTI + base breach in key ally + new Houthi front + 36% approval + Dow correction = political sustainability window narrowing to DAYS not weeks. Source: CNBC/NYT/Reuters/CAP/AAA

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
